description:
Sundry is a WinGet local manifest management tool that makes it easier for you to remove manifests, make changes to them, and also aids in updating them.


Miscellaneous
- chore(config): Move config file to user folder to avoid overwriting on update. by @DuckDuckStudio
  See the description in [README](https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry?tab=readme-ov-file#使用说明) for more information on the changes.
Full changelog: https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry/compare/1.0.11...1.1.0
